originalTitle: Will Trump help or hinder Zimbabwe's white farmers in their compensation battle?
title: Will Trump help or hinder Zimbabwe's white farmers in their compensation battle?
content: They have engaged a lobbying firm with close ties to the US president to argue their case.

originalTitle: Severe flooding kills 62 in Kenya, as heavy rains continue
title: Severe flooding kills 62 in Kenya, as heavy rains continue
content: Eleven people were rescued overnight after a minibus taxi got stuck in rising floodwaters in Nairobi.

originalTitle: Fears for press freedom as billionaire takes control of East Africa's largest media house
title: Fears for press freedom as billionaire takes control of East Africa's largest media house
content: Rostam Aziz's purchase raises questions about continued journalistic independence in the region.

originalTitle: Mercedes teenager Kimi Antonelli wins first F1 in China; Russell second
title: Mercedes teenager Kimi Antonelli wins first F1 in China; Russell second
content: The 19-year-old converts his pole position into a historic win to consolidate Mercedes's hold early in the F1 season.

originalTitle: Trump says US may hit Iran’s Kharg Island again ‘just for fun’
title: Trump says US may hit Iran’s Kharg Island again ‘just for fun’
content: US president says his country may carry out more strikes on oil hub as he urges allies to help open Strait of Hormuz.

originalTitle: Iran war: What is happening on day 16 of US-Israel attacks?
title: Iran war: What is happening on day 16 of US-Israel attacks?
content: Israel and US attacks on Isfahan kills 15 people as Tehran carries out retaliatory attacks on Israel and Gulf countries.

originalTitle: BBC visits aftermath of Israeli strike on Lebanon that killed family as IDF targets Hezbollah
title: BBC visits aftermath of Israeli strike on Lebanon that killed family as IDF targets Hezbollah
content: A relative tells BBC those killed were civilians and not Hezbollah operatives, but the Israel Defense Forces says it was targeting "terrorist infrastructure".

originalTitle: US names six crew killed in refuelling plane crash in Iraq
title: US names six crew killed in refuelling plane crash in Iraq
content: The aircraft was on a combat mission as part of ongoing US operations against Iran when it crashed in western Iraq on Thursday.

originalTitle: Severe flooding kills 62 in Kenya, as heavy rains continue
title: Severe flooding kills 62 in Kenya, as heavy rains continue
content: Eleven people were rescued overnight after a minibus taxi got stuck in rising floodwaters in Nairobi.

originalTitle: Record-breaker Dowman scores late as Arsenal beat Everton
title: Record-breaker Dowman scores late as Arsenal beat Everton
content: Sixteen-year-old Max Dowman becomes the youngest scorer in Premier League history, as Arsenal score twice in the last 10 minutes to beat Everton 2-0 and move 10 points clear at the top of the table.

originalTitle: Man City held by West Ham who move out of relegation zone
title: Man City held by West Ham who move out of relegation zone
content: West Ham come from behind to earn a point against Manchester City as Nuno Espirito Santo's side move out of the bottom three, while Pep Guardiola's side drop nine points behind leaders Arsenal in the Premier League.

originalTitle: Gordon goal gives Newcastle rare win at Chelsea
title: Gordon goal gives Newcastle rare win at Chelsea
content: Chelsea's hopes of qualifying for the Champions League are dealt a blow as Newcastle's Anthony Gordon scores the only goal of the game, to clinch a first away win at Stamford Bridge since 2012 for the Magpies.
